description: CompositionGrey T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round ribbed neckline, short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursWarm iron onlyDo not bleach, or dry cleanTumble dry on lowWarm iron; do not iron on printThis grey T-shirt from nike is a perfect mix of sporty and bold styling. The graphic print of the skyline with buildings and a Ferris wheel is stylish, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you feeling cool and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans or tracks.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
